title: Fix t_echo bridge LoRa device symbol build failure
description: Why: building firmware/bridge-zephyr for board t_echo/nrf52840 with LoRa enabled configures devicetree cleanly, then lora_l2.c fails to compile with DEVICE_DT_GET(DT_ALIAS(lora0)) referencing an undeclared __device_dts_ord_* symbol. What: investigate the t_echo LoRa node/driver enablement so the real t_echo/nrf52840 bridge build compiles after devicetree generation.
close_reason: Fixed T-Echo LoRa overlay to enable the existing board-defined SX1262 node instead of redefining a duplicate node; verified LoRa-enabled t_echo/nrf52840 bridge build compiles lora_l2.c, builds sx126x driver objects, and links zephyr.elf.
